case_title: SIDNEY BURROWS VS. MONTESSORI HOUSE OF CHILDREN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURROWS, SIDNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTESSORI HOUSE OF CHILDREN $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $475.00, $400 REFUND OF DEPOSIT, IF NOT PREVIOUSLY PAID. IF DEFENDANT PAYS THIS AMOUNT BEFORE THIS JUDGMENT IS RECEIVED, DEFENDANT OWES PLAINTIFF $75. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MONTESSORI HOUSE OF CHILDREN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (STATED FEE FOR SERVICE: 0) SERVED FEB-22-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MONTESSORI HOUSE OF CHILDREN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MONTESSORI HOUSE OF CHILDREN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY BURROWS, SIDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT MONTESSORI HOUSE OF CHILDREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROHAN WANIGATUNGA, OWNER. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
